summary: Frontend-only UI/UX bug fix verification completed. All 5 fixes PASSED: Footer Services expand/collapse, services links navigation, pet switcher horizontal scroll, notifications page mobile stability, Pet Soul page philosophical content.

issues: Shows 'No services found' - may be data availability issue, not UI bug

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 UI/UX bug fixes verified working. Footer Services toggle uses data-testid='footer-services-toggle'. Pet switcher on /membership has overflow-x-auto + scrollbar-hide. Notifications uses min-h-screen + 100dvh.

footer_services_expand_collapse.details: Services section expands/collapses correctly on mobile footer

footer_services_links_navigation.details: Service links use correct /services?pillar=X format and navigate properly

pet_switcher_horizontal_scroll.details: Pet names scroll horizontally without overflow on /membership page

notifications_mobile_stability.details: Notifications/Inbox page loads without visual glitches or shaking on mobile

pet_soul_page_content.details: Pet Soul page shows updated philosophical/emotional content
content_verified: Because they can't tell us what they need — so we learn to understand.
Pet Soul™ is your pet's evolving digital portrait
What is Pet Soul™? section with emotional messaging
Cards: Quiet Attention, Thoughtful Care, One Connected Life
